title: Cypilot Workspace Configuration (.cypilot-workspace.toml)
description: Federation layer for multi-repo workspace support. Maps named sources (repos) to local paths with roles. Standalone file uses TOML format.

sources.description: Named source repositories in the workspace. Keys are human-readable names.

path.description: Local filesystem path to the source repo. Resolved relative to workspace file location.

adapter.description: Path to adapter directory within the source repo (e.g., '.bootstrap'). Omit if repo has no adapter.

role.description: Constrains what the source contributes. 'artifacts' = only artifacts, 'codebase' = only code, 'kits' = only kits, 'full' = everything.

url.description: Git remote URL (HTTPS or SSH). Only supported in standalone workspace files, not inline config.

branch.description: Git branch or ref to checkout. Defaults to HEAD when not specified.

cross_repo.description: Enable cross-repo traceability (resolve IDs across sources)

resolve_remote_ids.description: Allow resolving @cpt-* IDs defined in remote sources

resolve_config.description: Git URL resolution settings. Controls where cloned repos are stored and how URLs map to local paths.

workdir.description: Working directory for cloned repos, relative to workspace file location.

namespace.description: Maps Git host to local directory template via exact host match. Keys are hostnames, values are path templates with {org} and {repo} placeholders. When no rule matches, the default template {org}/{repo} is used. Example: {"gitlab.com": "{org}/{repo}"}.

allowed_content_languages.description: Language codes permitted in Markdown artifact content. Default when absent: English only. Add codes to allow additional Unicode scripts (e.g. ["en", "ru"]).
